title: [circt-verilog] Import difference of results in arcilator failure with remaining llhd constant_time

features.name: split always_ff blocks writing to same signal different bits
features.description: Code should include two separate always_ff blocks that assign to different bits of the same signal on the same clock edge
features.snippet:
always_ff @(posedge clk) mem[0] <= data;
always_ff @(posedge clk) mem[1] <= data;

features.name: packed struct assignment from partial always_ff blocks
features.description: Code should include two always_ff blocks with each assigning to a different member of a packed struct signal

features.name: multiple always_ff on same signal same clock
features.description: Code should include multiple always_ff blocks triggered by the same clock signal, each assigning to different parts of the same output signal
